channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Pakistan urges US and Iran to uphold ceasefire after talks end
item.description: Pakistani Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar has insisted the US and Iran must uphold their ceasefire agreement.

item.title: US and Iran fail to reach peace deal after marathon talks in Pakistan
item.description: Vice President JD Vance says Iran chose not to accept US terms, while Iran says it did not expect a deal at the first meeting.

item.title: Oil tankers exit Strait of Hormuz amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Three supertankers laden with oil exit waterway amid global energy crunch, shipping data shows.

item.title: Why did US-Iran talks end without an agreement in Pakistan?
item.description: Despite high-level talks for the first time in years, the US and Iran couldn't reach agreement on terms to end the war.

item.title: Watch JD Vance’s full remarks after US-Iran talks end without deal
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance is leaving Pakistan, saying Tehran chose not to accept their ‘final and best offer’.

item.title: US delegation leaves Pakistan without reaching Iran deal
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance says the US delegation has failed to reach an agreement with Iran.

item.title: Iran must not charge tolls in Strait of Hormuz, UN maritime chief says
item.description: In interview with Al Jazeera, International Maritime Organization chief says world should reject tolls in waterway.

item.title: Iran war live: Vance says no deal reached, US has made ‘best, final offer’
item.description: Iranian media say the US was looking for an excuse to leave the talks and that the 'ball is in America's court'.

item.title: US President Trump says US ‘wins’ regardless of how Iran talks go
item.description: US President Donald Trump says ‘we win regardless of what happens’ in Iran talks.

item.title: “Diplomacy is not an event, it’s a process, it takes time.”
item.description: Former Pakistani diplomat says expectations from the Islamabad talks between the US and Iran should be realistic.
